changeSet.author: microfina
changeSet.comment: Vue d'unification UNION ALL des 5 sources de garanties. Utilisée par tous les états BCM de couverture (sous-phases 10.3 et 10.4).
changeSet.createView:
SELECT 'GARANTIE_GEN' AS source_table, CAST(g.IDGARANTIE AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS source_id, g.CODE_TYPE_GARANTIE AS code_type_garantie, g.IDCREDIT AS idcredit, g.NUM_MEMBRE_GARANT AS num_membre, g.VALEUR_ESTIMEE AS valeur_estimee, g.STATUT AS statut, g.DATE_SAISIE AS date_constitution, g.DATE_MAINLEVEE AS date_liberation, g.OBSERVATIONS AS observations FROM Garantie g
UNION ALL
-- ── HYPOTHEQUE_CREDIT (P4-007) ───────────────────────────────── -- VALEUR_ESTIMEE : valeur marchande estimée (col. réelle) -- DATE_HYPOTHEQUE : date de l'acte hypothécaire (= date_constitution) -- STATUT, DATE_LIBERATION, NUM_MEMBRE : absents → NULL -- observations : DESCRIPTION (désignation du bien immobilier) SELECT 'HYPOTHEQUE_CREDIT' AS source_table, CAST(h.IDHYPOTHEQUE AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS source_id, 'HYPOTHEQUE' AS code_type_garantie, h.idcredit AS idcredit, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS num_membre, h.VALEUR_ESTIMEE AS valeur_estimee, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS statut, h.DATE_HYPOTHEQUE AS date_constitution, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS date_liberation, h.DESCRIPTION AS observations FROM HYPOTHEQUE_CREDIT h
UNION ALL
-- ── gageCredit (P4-008) ──────────────────────────────────────── -- VALEUR : valeur estimée de l'actif gagé (nom différent de VALEUR_ESTIMEE) -- DATE_GAGE : date du contrat de gage (= date_constitution) -- STATUT, DATE_LIBERATION, NUM_MEMBRE : absents → NULL -- observations : DESCRIPTION (désignation du bien meuble) SELECT 'GAGE_CREDIT' AS source_table, CAST(gc.IDGAGE AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS source_id, 'GAGE' AS code_type_garantie, gc.idcredit AS idcredit, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS num_membre, gc.VALEUR AS valeur_estimee, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS statut, gc.DATE_GAGE AS date_constitution, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS date_liberation, gc.DESCRIPTION AS observations FROM gageCredit gc
UNION ALL
-- ── Caution (P4-009) ─────────────────────────────────────────── -- MONTANT_CAUTION : montant garanti par la caution (valeur économique) -- DATE_CAUTION : date d'émission de la caution (= date_constitution) -- DATE_EXPIRATION : date d'expiration (= date_liberation, seule table P4 avec fin) -- STATUT, NUM_MEMBRE : absents → NULL -- observations : NOM_CAUTION (nom de l'organisme cautionnaire) SELECT 'CAUTION' AS source_table, CAST(ca.IDCAUTION AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS source_id, 'CAUTION_PERSONNELLE' AS code_type_garantie, ca.idcredit AS idcredit, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS num_membre, ca.MONTANT_CAUTION AS valeur_estimee, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS statut, ca.DATE_CAUTION AS date_constitution, ca.DATE_EXPIRATION AS date_liberation, ca.NOM_CAUTION AS observations FROM Caution ca
UNION ALL
-- ── Nantissement (P4-010) ────────────────────────────────────── -- VALEUR : valeur estimée de l'actif nanti (nom différent de VALEUR_ESTIMEE) -- DATE_NANTISSEMENT : date de l'acte de nantissement (= date_constitution) -- STATUT, DATE_LIBERATION, NUM_MEMBRE : absents → NULL -- observations : DESCRIPTION (désignation de l'actif incorporel) SELECT 'NANTISSEMENT' AS source_table, CAST(n.IDNANTISSEMENT AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS source_id, 'NANTISSEMENT' AS code_type_garantie, n.idcredit AS idcredit, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS num_membre, n.VALEUR AS valeur_estimee, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS statut, n.DATE_NANTISSEMENT AS date_constitution, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS date_liberation, n.DESCRIPTION AS observations FROM Nantissement n
